name: demo-project
description: Fullstack TypeScript monorepo with React frontend and Koa backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm --workspace frontend run dev" "npm --workspace backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace frontend run build && npm --workspace backend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace frontend run typecheck && npm --workspace backend run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace frontend run lint && npm --workspace backend run lint
